thinks.think: A central bright light radiates purple rays outward against a lavender background. The intensity increases as yellow and green hues mix into the center. Faint, swirling circular lines appear overlaying the expanding starburst pattern, creating a complex, energetic tunnel effect with more numerous light beams.

The yellow and blue floral mandala pattern remains central, radiating from a bright white core. A new, large geometric polygon outline emerges in the foreground, featuring yellow and white edges. This angular shape frames the underlying curved design, adding a structured layer to the expanding purple radial background.

The complex geometric pattern recedes as a small, blue-skinned figure wearing a red outfit appears in the center, sitting cross-legged in a meditative pose. Bright yellow light rays explode outward from behind the character, dominating the visual field. Faint text reading "patch paradise" is visible directly below the seated figure.

The blue-skinned figure in red robes remains seated centrally against the bursting yellow rays. Below the character, the stylized text "patch paradise" clarifies. Large blue serif text reading "The Parable of Good or Bad" fades in underneath, followed by smaller, fainter credit text appearing at the very bottom of the screen.

The central blue figure and title text remain static. The background rays shift from bright yellow to a muted greenish-yellow hue. The credit text "Presented by Patchman and She-Patch" is fully visible at the bottom, completing the title card layout as the lighting dims slightly.

The title card fades to black, briefly showing only the bottom credit text. The scene cuts to a bright outdoor landscape with green hills and a red barn. A yellow figure wearing a conical hat leans on a wooden fence as a brown horse exits right. The text "_ OOPS..." appears near the character.

A yellow figure wearing a conical hat leans on a wooden fence in a green field with a red barn. To the right, a brown horse exits the frame, leaving only its tail visible. The text "_ OOPS..." appears near the character's head as the animal moves away.

A purple figure wearing blue overalls appears on the left, placing a hand on the shoulder of the yellow figure with a conical hat. The yellow character stands inside a wooden doorway. Handwritten text reading "There There" floats near the purple figure's arm.

The purple figure withdraws their hand from the yellow figure's shoulder and rests both hands on their hips. Simultaneously, the yellow figure standing in the doorway raises both arms outward with open palms and exhibits a wide, open-mouthed smile. The floating text "There There" vanishes from the scene.

The view shifts to a wide outdoor landscape featuring green rolling hills and a wooden fence stretching across the middle ground. On the right side, a small brown animal runs leftward along the grassy slope near a large brown bush.

The wide landscape shot continues with green rolling hills and a wooden fence. A small brown animal runs leftward along the grassy slope on the right side, positioned near a large brown bush. The light blue sky and static fence elements remain unchanged during this brief interval.

The scene cuts to a yellow figure wearing a conical hat leaning against a wooden fence with a piece of straw in their mouth. To the left, a pen holds several brown horses under a sign reading "New Horses". The figure looks forward while resting their arms on the fence rails.

The scene cuts to a medium shot against a plain blue background. The yellow figure with a conical hat leans on a wooden post on the left, gesturing with one hand toward the right. Opposite them, the purple figure wearing blue overalls stands facing the yellow character with hands resting on hips.

The scene remains static with no visible changes. The yellow figure wearing a conical hat leans on a wooden post on the left, gesturing with one hand. Opposite them, the purple figure in blue overalls stands facing left with hands resting on hips. Both characters maintain their positions against the plain light blue background.

The scene shifts to a green hillside where a grey horse with a brown mane gallops leftward. An orange, stick-figure character rides on the horse's back, flailing their limbs and displaying an open mouth as if shouting or distressed while the animal runs beneath a blue sky with a white cloud.

The scene cuts to a green hillside where the yellow figure sits on a chair, holding the orange figure's leg which is encased in a brown splint. The orange figure sits opposite on a matching chair. Behind them, the purple figure in blue overalls stands on the grass, raising one hand.

The scene remains static showing the yellow figure seated and holding the orange figure's leg, which is encased in a brown splint. The orange figure sits opposite on a chair. In the background, the purple figure in blue overalls stands on the grass with one hand raised against the sky.

The yellow figure wearing a conical hat and the orange figure both open their mouths while seated opposite each other. The yellow figure holds the orange figure's leg, which is encased in a brown splint. Behind them, the purple figure in blue overalls lowers their previously raised hand to their side.

A new scene shows a procession of purple figures walking up a dirt path on a green hill. The leader at the front wears yellow pants and a yellow hat, carrying a red flag with a black symbol. A line of identical purple figures follows behind in single file against a blue sky.

The scene remains static showing a procession of purple figures walking up a dirt path on a green hill. The leader, wearing yellow pants and a yellow hat, carries a red flag with a black symbol. A line of identical purple figures follows behind in single file against a blue sky.

The scene cuts to a green hillside where a purple figure in yellow armor gestures while speaking. Text appears reading 'Stay home and rest, you are not fit for battle'. An orange figure stands nearby leaning on a crutch, while a yellow figure in a conical hat stands with arms crossed in the background near a wooden fence.

The text disappears. The armored purple figure walks away left. The orange figure with a crutch and the yellow figure with a conical hat turn away. The yellow figure raises a hand toward a purple figure in blue overalls on a distant hill, who also raises an arm.

The armored purple figure walks further left away from the group. The orange figure stands still leaning on a crutch beside the yellow figure in a conical hat. The yellow figure keeps a hand raised toward a distant purple figure in blue overalls on a hill, who maintains a waving pose against the sky.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of the yellow figure wearing a brown conical hat against a plain light blue background. The character faces forward with a subtle smile, arms hanging loosely at their sides. This view isolates the figure, removing the green hills, wooden fence, and other characters seen in the prior sequence.

The yellow figure wearing a brown conical hat remains centered against the light blue background. Their facial expression shifts as eyes close into curved lines and the mouth opens in a smile. The left arm raises, bending at the elbow with the hand open and palm facing upward in a gesturing motion.

The scene cuts to black, revealing a forest with purple trees. A light blue figure with visible stitches kneels on grass facing a pink female figure with purple hair sitting cross-legged. She offers a red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" to the kneeling blue character.

In a forest setting with purple trees, a pink female figure places a red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" on the ground between herself and a kneeling light blue figure with stitches. The blue figure extends an arm toward the book while the pink figure sits with hands in her lap.

The light blue figure with stitches raises its right arm to touch the back of its head, retracting from the previous reach toward the red book on the grass. The pink female figure with purple hair remains seated cross-legged opposite, hands resting in her lap, while the book labeled "Buddhist Parables" stays on the ground between them.

The kneeling light blue figure with stitches moves its right arm from reaching toward the red book to touching the back of its head. The pink figure with purple hair remains seated cross-legged with hands in her lap. The book labeled 'Buddhist Parables' stays on the grass between them in the forest.

The light blue figure with stitches shifts from extending a hand to crossing arms over their chest while kneeling. The pink figure with purple hair remains seated cross-legged opposite them with hands in their lap. The red book labeled 'Buddhist Parables' lies on the grass between them in the forest setting.

The kneeling light blue figure with stitches uncrosses their arms and extends both limbs outward to the sides. The pink figure with purple hair remains seated cross-legged opposite them. The red book labeled 'Buddhist Parables' stays on the grass between the two characters in the forest setting.

The light blue figure with stitches remains kneeling with arms extended outward to the sides. The pink figure with purple hair sits cross-legged opposite, hands in lap. The red book labeled 'Buddhist Parables' rests on the grass between them in the forest.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of the light blue figure standing alone in the forest with arms crossed over their chest. The pink figure and the red book are no longer visible in the frame. The background features purple tree canopies and brown trunks.

The light blue figure with stitches stands in the forest. Previously crossing their arms, they now lower both arms to their sides, extending them slightly outward. The background of purple tree canopies and brown trunks remains constant. No other characters or the red book are visible in this medium shot.

The light blue figure with stitches lowers their arms from a high raised V-shape to cross them in front of their torso. The figure stands alone in the forest setting with purple tree canopies and brown trunks. The background remains consistent with green grass and dark blue sky.

The scene cuts to a dark blue background featuring two characters. On the left, a figure in a red coat and large feathered hat holds a ring with a blue gem. On the right, a figure in dark robes with a turban and a silver hook hand stands with a frown.

Against a dark blue background, the figure in the red coat and feathered hat smiles with closed eyes and hands on hips. The character in dark robes and a turban smiles broadly with both arms raised in the air. The ring and hook hand previously visible are gone.

The figure in the red coat and feathered hat stands with hands on hips and closed smiling eyes. Opposite, the figure in dark robes and a turban maintains raised arms and a broad smile. The dark blue background remains constant as both figures hold their poses with no items in hand.

The video cuts back to the forest setting with purple canopy trees. A light blue stitched figure kneels on the left side, facing a pink figure with purple hair who sits cross-legged on the right. A red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" lies on the green grass between the two characters.

The pink figure with purple hair clasps hands together near the chest and closes eyes while sitting cross-legged. The light blue stitched figure remains kneeling opposite on the green grass. The red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" lies undisturbed between the two characters in the forest setting.

The pink figure lowers her hands from her chest to rest on her lap while keeping her eyes closed. The light blue stitched figure remains kneeling opposite her without moving. The red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" stays on the green grass between them in the forest setting.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of the pink figure with purple hair sitting cross-legged. She opens her large green eyes, gazing forward. Her hands rest on her legs. The blue figure and the red book are no longer visible. Brown tree trunks and purple foliage appear in the background.

The pink figure with purple hair sits cross-legged in the forest with brown tree trunks. She moves her arms from an extended outward position to holding her hands together in front of her chest. Her green eyes remain open and focused forward throughout the movement.

The pink figure with purple hair lowers her hands from a clasped position at her chest to rest on her thighs. She remains seated cross-legged in the forest with brown tree trunks visible behind her. Her green eyes remain open and fixed forward during this motion.

The pink figure with purple hair sits cross-legged in the forest. She extends her arms outward to her sides from a resting position on her legs. Her mouth changes from a slight smile to a straight, neutral line, while her large green eyes remain open and fixed forward throughout the movement.

The view cuts to a wide shot of the forest clearing where both the light blue stitched figure and the pink figure sit cross-legged facing each other. Both characters now hold their hands pressed together in a prayer position at their chests, flanking the red book on the ground.

The light blue stitched figure and the pink figure sit cross-legged facing each other with hands pressed together in prayer. The red book rests on the grass between them. The lighting shifts dramatically, darkening the entire forest scene into shadow while the characters maintain their static poses.

The video cuts to a kaleidoscope background with symmetrical geometric patterns in blue and green. White text overlays appear, reading "Thanks for Watching" at the top, "patch parables" in the center, and a website URL at the bottom inviting viewers to an experience on the Spirit Science website.

White text reading "Thanks for Watching," "patch parables," and a website URL overlays a shifting kaleidoscope background. The symmetrical pattern features blue, purple, and green geometric shapes radiating from the center. The text remains static while the background design subtly evolves.

White text reading "Thanks for Watching," "patch parables," and a website URL remains overlaid on the screen. Behind the static text, the kaleidoscope background continues to shift subtly. The symmetrical geometric pattern, featuring blue, purple, and green shapes with orange outlines, evolves slightly in its design while radiating from the center.

White text reading "Thanks for Watching", "patch parables", and a website URL remains static on screen. Behind the text, the kaleidoscope background continues its subtle animation, with the symmetrical geometric pattern of blue, purple, and green shapes shifting and evolving slightly while radiating from the center.

White text overlays including "Thanks for Watching", "patch parables", and a website URL remain static. Behind them, the kaleidoscope background continues its subtle animation, with the symmetrical geometric pattern of blue, purple, and green shapes shifting and evolving slightly while radiating from the center.

White credit text listing names like Jordan Duchnycz appears on the left over the shifting kaleidoscope background. On the right, two video thumbnails are displayed: an animated scene labeled "Last Weeks Video" above a live-action clip titled "Mechanics of Manifesting Reality".

The credit screen layout persists with static white text on the left. On the right, the video thumbnails update their content. The top thumbnail displays different animated scenes involving figures on a hill and by water. The bottom thumbnail changes to show a close-up of a hand drawing on paper.

White credit text listing contributors remains on the left. On the right, the top thumbnail shows a light blue figure with a backpack by water, while the bottom displays a hand drawing on paper. Titles label these sections, all set against a shifting kaleidoscope background.

White credit text remains static on the left against the shifting kaleidoscope background. On the right, the top video thumbnail updates to show white crystal structures on a green hill, while the bottom thumbnail displays a hand holding a sheet of paper.

The credit screen layout persists with static white text on the left. On the right, the top video thumbnail updates to display a landscape featuring a rainbow and pink trees. The bottom thumbnail shows a hand drawing on paper. The kaleidoscope background continues its subtle, shifting animation behind the overlays.

The left credit text remains static. On the right, the top thumbnail changes to a blue water scene with yellow shapes near a green shore. The bottom thumbnail shows hands manipulating white paper. The kaleidoscope background continues shifting with blue and green geometric patterns.

In the upper right thumbnail, the animated scene updates to display a grey rectangular structure extending over blue water near a green shore. In the lower thumbnail, a hand uses a pen to draw on a sheet of white paper. The white credit text on the left remains static against the continuously shifting kaleidoscope background.

In the top right thumbnail, the scene shifts from a grey structure over water to a light blue figure with a backpack standing on a green bank. The bottom thumbnail shows a hand writing on paper. Static white credits remain left, overlaid on the shifting blue and purple kaleidoscope background.

The entire screen fades to black, significantly darkening the white credit text on the left and the two video thumbnails on the right. The top thumbnail featuring a blue figure and the bottom showing hands drawing become dim against the shifting kaleidoscope background.

summary.text: [0-2] Purple rays radiate from a central light, intensifying with yellow/green hues and swirling lines. [2-4] A yellow/blue floral mandala radiates from a white core as a large geometric polygon outline with yellow/white edges emerges. [4-6] The pattern recedes; a blue-skinned figure in red sits cross-legged meditating while bright yellow rays explode outward and faint text "patch paradise" appears. [6-10] The figure remains as "patch paradise" clarifies and blue serif text "The Parable of Good or Bad" fades in. Background rays shift to muted greenish-yellow; credit text "Presented by Patchman and She-Patch" becomes fully visible. [10-12] The card fades to black, then cuts to a green landscape with a red barn where a yellow figure in a conical hat leans on a fence as a brown horse exits right and text "_ OOPS..." appears.

[12-14] A yellow figure wearing a conical hat leans on a wooden fence as a brown horse exits the frame to the right, leaving only its tail visible; the text "_ OOPS..." appears near the character's head. [14-16] A purple figure in blue overalls places a comforting hand on the yellow figure's shoulder inside a wooden doorway, accompanied by handwritten text "There There". [16-18] The purple figure withdraws their hand to rest on hips, while the yellow figure smiles broadly with arms raised outward in a welcoming gesture. [18-22] The scene shifts to a wide landscape of green rolling hills and a wooden fence where a small brown animal runs leftward along the slope near a large bush. [22-24] The yellow figure leans casually on a fence with a piece of straw in their mouth, looking past a pen labeled "New Horses" containing several brown horses. [24-28] Against a plain light blue background, the yellow figure leans on a wooden post gesturing toward the purple figure, who stands opposite with hands resting on hips.

[28-30] An orange stick figure rides a galloping grey horse with a brown mane, flailing limbs and shouting under a blue sky. [30-36] On a green hillside, a yellow figure wearing a conical hat sits on a chair opposite the orange figure, holding their leg which is encased in a brown splint. A purple figure in blue overalls stands behind them, initially raising a hand then lowering it as the seated figures open their mouths. [36-40] A procession of purple figures marches up a dirt path on a green hill, led by a figure in yellow armor and hat carrying a red flag with a black symbol. [40-42] The armored purple figure gestures to the orange figure, who now leans on a crutch, while text appears reading "Stay home and rest, you are not fit for battle". A yellow figure in a conical hat stands with crossed arms nearby near a wooden fence.

[42-46] An armored purple figure walks left away from a group containing an orange figure with a crutch and a yellow figure in a conical hat. The yellow figure waves to a distant purple figure in blue overalls on a hill, who waves back. [46-50] The scene cuts to the yellow figure against a blue background; they smile, close their eyes, and raise a hand in a gesture. [50-52] After a black screen, a light blue figure with stitches kneels in a forest opposite a pink female figure with purple hair. She places a red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" on the ground. [52-56] The blue figure reaches for the book but retracts their arm to scratch their head. The pink figure sits calmly as the book remains between them.

[56-64] In a forest with purple canopies, a kneeling light blue figure with stitches sits opposite a pink figure with purple hair. A red book labeled 'Buddhist Parables' lies on the grass between them. The blue figure touches the back of its head, crosses arms over its chest, and extends limbs outward, while the pink figure remains seated cross-legged with hands in her lap.
[64-70] The scene cuts to the light blue figure standing alone; the pink figure and book are gone. The blue figure stands with arms crossed, then extends them slightly outward. Finally, the figure lowers arms from a high raised V-shape to cross them in front of its torso.

[70-76] Against a dark blue background, a figure in a red coat and feathered hat holds a ring with a blue gem while facing a frowning figure in dark robes with a turban and silver hook hand. The scene shifts as the red-coated figure smiles with hands on hips and the robed figure raises both arms, smiling broadly; the ring and hook are no longer visible. [76-84] The setting changes to a forest with purple canopy trees where a light blue stitched figure kneels opposite a pink figure with purple hair sitting cross-legged. A red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" rests on the grass between them. The pink figure clasps her hands near her chest and closes her eyes, then lowers her hands to her lap. Finally, the camera focuses on the pink figure as she opens her large green eyes, gazing forward.

[84-90] The pink figure with purple hair sits cross-legged in the forest, moving her arms from an extended position to clasped at her chest, then down to her thighs, and finally outward again as her mouth shifts from a smile to a neutral line. [90-94] A wide shot reveals a light blue stitched figure sitting opposite her; both characters hold hands in a prayer position at their chests, flanking a red book on the ground, before the forest lighting darkens significantly. [94-98] The video concludes with a shifting kaleidoscope background featuring blue and green geometric shapes, overlaid with white text reading "Thanks for Watching", "patch parables", and "Have an experience on the Spirit Science Website! www.thespiritscience.net".

[98-104] Static white text overlays reading "Thanks for Watching", "patch parables", "Have an experience on the Spirit Science Website!", and "www.thespiritscience.net" remain centered. Behind them, a kaleidoscope background featuring blue, purple, and green geometric shapes with orange outlines shifts subtly.
[104-112] The layout changes to show credits on the left, listing "Jordan Duchnycz and Vanessa Cuccia", "Lee VanPelt", "Seb Skelly", and "Seth Mikhail", alongside a thank you message and the website URL. On the right, two video thumbnails appear. The top, labeled "Last Weeks Video", cycles through animated scenes of figures on a hill, a figure by water, and crystals. The bottom, labeled "Mechanics of Manifesting Reality", shows a person speaking and then drawing on paper. The kaleidoscope background continues shifting throughout.
